projects.name: Real-Time Chat App
projects.summary: Full-stack real-time messaging application with Node.js backend and React frontend. Deployed on AWS EC2 with Docker containerization and GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline. Demonstrates proficiency in modern web architecture, DevOps practices, and real-time communication patterns.

projects.name: Sentiment Analysis Tool
projects.summary: NLP project fine-tuning BERT model for sentiment classification on 80,000 tweets. Processed data using PyTorch and NumPy, stored results in PostgreSQL. Demonstrates machine learning pipeline development and large-scale text processing.

impact_highlights.description: Processed and analyzed 80,000 tweets using fine-tuned BERT model for sentiment classification, demonstrating ability to handle large-scale NLP datasets.
Deployed real-time chat application to AWS EC2 with Docker containerization and automated CI/CD pipeline via GitHub Actions, demonstrating production-ready deployment practices.
Built and deployed REST API using Flask to GCP Cloud Run during internship, handling ETL pipeline for CSV data transformation.

PyTorch and PostgreSQL are project-specific; limited breadth of evidence but clear usage context. Excluded scikit-learn despite internship mention due to minimal detail (basic logistic regression).

SQL included as foundational skill evidenced by SQLAlchemy usage and PostgreSQL work, though not explicitly highlighted. Git included based on GitHub Actions CI/CD mention, though not explicitly detailed.
